agentSpawn.command: echo 'obsidian-shiki-plugin harness active | Desktop + Mobile emulation | MCPs: obsidian-cli, electron-devtools'

postToolUse.command: git diff --name-only | grep '\.ts$' >/dev/null && bun run typecheck || true

preToolUse.command: echo 'Executing bash command. Avoid destructive operations on dist/ and exampleVault/'
